fields.label: Report type
fields.rationale: Report Builder is the safest default: field-list + filters, no SQL or Python, no Script Manager role needed. Query Report requires a raw SQL string in `query` and passes check_safe_sql_query() (DDL / DML / multi-statement rejected). Script Report requires Script Manager role and executes Python from report_script. Custom Report renders an existing Report Builder config with different columns.

fields.label: Standard
fields.rationale: 'No' = site-local (DB-only). 'Yes' writes the report to an app's filesystem and requires developer_mode + Administrator at save time; non-devs / non-Admins cannot create standard reports. Flipping 'Yes'->'No' on an existing standard report is ALSO blocked.

fields.label: Module
fields.rationale: Required only when is_standard='Yes'. Otherwise auto-fetched from the ref_doctype's module at save time.

fields.label: SQL query (Query Report only)
fields.rationale: Required when report_type='Query Report'. Must be a single SELECT - DDL / DML / multi-statement / CREATE / INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE are rejected by check_safe_sql_query(). Use parameterised filters via `%(filter_name)s`, never string-interpolate.

fields.label: Report script (Script Report only)
fields.rationale: Required when report_type='Script Report' AND is_standard='No'. Python body executed server-side with access to frappe / frappe.utils / the filters dict. Must return a tuple (columns, data) or (columns, data, message, chart, report_summary). Requires Script Manager role.

fields.label: Prepared report (async)
fields.rationale: Runs the report in a background job and emails the user when done. Auto-enabled when a Script Report exceeds a 15-second runtime. Default off for small / interactive reports.

fields.label: Disabled
fields.rationale: Default enabled. Use 1 to keep the report row around but hide it from the Report list (useful for deprecated reports you might restore).

fields.label: Add total row
fields.rationale: Appends a totals row. Silently ignored for Report Builder (depends_on in the JSON form gates it to Query / Script Report). Safe default off.

fields.label: Letter head (for PDF / printed reports)
fields.rationale: Only applicable when is_standard='No'. Names an existing Letter Head whose header / footer wraps PDF / print renders of this report. Auto-nulled at save when is_standard='Yes' - standard reports use the system-wide Print Settings default instead.

fields.label: Reference Report (for Custom Report)
fields.rationale: Required when report_type='Custom Report'. Names the underlying Report Builder report whose filter + doctype config is reused; the Custom Report overrides only the columns. Empty for other report_types.

fields.label: Translate data in output
fields.rationale: When 1, report output values pass through the Translation layer at render (useful for Select-option labels, status values). Default 0.

fields.label: Prepared report timeout (seconds)
fields.rationale: Only meaningful when prepared_report=1. Caps the background job duration; 0 uses the system default (usually 30 minutes). Raise for heavy Script Reports; lower for quick queries that should fail fast.
